titleStmt.title: SII 27.107: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 107. (A.R. No. 350 of 1930-31.) EḌAMAṄGALA, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Pañchaliṅgēśvara temple.

This damaged record, though engraved on another slab, appears to be in continuation of No. 106 above. It registers a gift of paddy for feeding three more brahmins, obviously in the temple of the village, commencing from the year Paridhāvi, Kārttika śu. 1. The gift was made by Rāmarasa at instance of Devarāja-voḍeya.
The date is identical with that of No. 106 above, corresponding to 1432 A.D., October 25. The weekday, however, is not mentioned. (Cf. No. 106 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dhāvi saṁvatsarada kārtika
śu 1 Āraṁbhavāgi dēvarājavo
yara nirūpadiṁ rāmarasaru
māḍida dharmada brāhmaṇajana nā
lku Ubhayaṁ brāhmaṇa bhōjana
da jana vaḷakke bhatta muḍe 215 kā
ṭi ga 12 Akṣaradalu bhatta mū
ḍe yiṁnūṟa hadinaidu kāṭi
gadyāṇa haṁneraḍu �yo hoṁ
nanū bhattavanū Uttarisi koṁḍu
�yo Ēḷumaṁdi brāhmaṇari
ge dēvara prasāda tuppa nālku
kuḍa majjige bhōjanāṁtarada
viḷeya I mariyādeyali
nityasthitiyali Ā caṁdrārkka
sthāiyāgi Ā grāmada nāra
ṇa pajji Aṁṇa viṣṇupajji Aṁṇa
ra
gaḷu naḍasi bahiri Eṁdu kaḍa
bada yibbaru karaṇikaru nālku
5 ku munūṟu The rest of the
Digital edition of SII 27.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
